title: Smooth Sand
description: Gives sand the wavy texture of soul soil
body:
Gives sand the same wavy texture as soul soil

![A beach with smooth sand texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a6a321c2fd4524fdb872e508c30d0dc29a8a777.jpeg)

Works with red sand too!

![A desert bordering with a mesa, using the smooth sand texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4881a5006941227b737d00844003361b77817f69.jpeg)
